name: global dry-run: --dry-run runs do NOT write audit log entries
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && : > .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://x.com --id x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --dry-run --emit-audit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" && [ ! -s .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl ] && echo ok 1>&2
